title: Retail Investors See Novavax Stock As Undervalued Despite Recent Challenges
text: Novavax Inc. had an impressive 2024, with its stock gaining nearly 68%. Shares of the company have gained 76.25% year-to-date as of November 2024. Despite recent challenges, retail investors remain optimistic, viewing the stock as undervalued at current levels. The stock has seen heightened attention on Stocktwits, boasting over 102,000 followers, making it the third-most-followed biotech ticker. Though the company reported a lower-than-expected loss and surpassed revenue estimates, it lowered its full-year revenue guidance, which hurt investor sentiment. Novavax faced setbacks late last year when the FDA placed its COVID-19 and influenza combination vaccine (CIC) on clinical hold due to a safety concern during trials. That hold was lifted within a month, allowing the company to resume development. NVAX has a Moderate Buy consensus rating based on three Buys, two Holds, and one Sell assigned in the last three months. Retail investors continue to see long-term potential in the combination vaccine and partnership-driven model.
